taxonomy: Gymnosphaera baileyana is classified within the phylum Equisetophyta, which is a group of vascular plants that belong to the division Equisetopsida. This division also includes the genus Equisetum, commonly known as horsetails. The phylum Equisetophyta is further divided into the class Equisetopsida, which comprises the single order Equisetales. Within this order, Gymnosphaera baileyana is placed in the family Equisetaceae. The classification of Gymnosphaera baileyana highlights its unique position among the vascular plants.
